name: zvideo_bind_renderer_dispatch
description: zVideo::BindRendererDispatch selects the renderer path, stores the fullscreen option, installs the renderer dispatch table, and clears cached hardware feature flags for redetection.
known_limits: VC5SP3 11.00.7022 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 COFF byte compare fails with 125 unmasked mismatches after masking 220 relocation bytes; Binary Ninja body is 485 bytes and the VC object body is 480 bytes with 15 trailing VC NOPs trimmed.
The reviewed failure is dispatch-table store ordering, branch layout, and register scheduling drift around the already binary-safe SetRendererTypeAndActivePath direct callee.
The native smoke verifies renderer/active-path/fullscreen state, selected dispatch slots, Direct3D texture creation binding, DirectDraw blit binding, and selected hardware feature-flag clearing.
